scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/backend & npm run dev -w apps/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w apps/frontend
scripts.format: npm run format -w apps/backend && npm run format -w apps/frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w apps/backend && npm run format:check -w apps/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/backend && npm run test -w apps/frontend
